name: The Amazing Crackpots Club!
short_description: A spellslinging dueling game for up to 4 players. Choose among seven cracked mages and use their unique abilities to shoot down your opponent’s magical flask while defending yours! Destroy your friends (and loved ones) in local or online modes!
detailed_description:
Face off against your classmates in a duel in The Amazing Crackpots Club! Use spells, potions and magical artifacts to destroy your opponents' giant potion flask, while protecting your own! Test your skills in either 1v1 or 2v2 matches in this frantic Dueling Sport, in both local and online game modes!

  • A unique STORY MODE where you can truly meet each member of the club!

  • Create profiles to track your records, and make your own CUSTOM COLOR PALETTES!

  • Create and save your own unique CUSTOM RULESETS to have full control over the match!

  • Learn the basics in the TUTORIAL, or try out new strategies in TRAINING MODE!

  • Test your abilities against friends with the ONLINE LOBBIES!.

  • 7 lovingly-animated characters with unique spells, abilities and play style.

  • Dedicated support for GAMEPAD and KEYBOARD controls!

Choose your beautifully-animated club member, and master their magical skills to defeat the opposition! Every mage shares the same four ability types, but they all put their own spin into it. Find their own unique strategies to come out on top!

A confident, reckless, but still friendly wizard-in-training that calls upon the power of the stars with the sheer force of his will! Rigel is an easy-to-learn, hard-to-master character that excels at speed.

Sarah “Sadie” Lilianne Millicent is an expert in Space-Time manipulation, and has achieved such mastery that she can duel without even looking up from her books.

A Hyperactive and fun-loving giant sentient moth that is obsessed with anything shiny. Mothilda uses her magic to summon special (and very shiny) glitter dust clouds she uses as shields.

A super friendly and hyper positive minotaur who thinks that the best magic is a healthy body! Mooscles doesn’t have the best mobility, and his abilities have limited use, but his large body covers a wide area, letting him reach bullets very easily.

Teacher at the prestigious Abracavial Academy of Actual Witchcraft, Breezedemus is a graceful and fabulous master of wind magic, which he uses to defeat his opponents in style!

Daughter of the evil queen of frost, Moranna dreams of world domination, and might just have the power to succeed! Her Ice magic lets her freeze bullets and even other duelists, and unlike the rest of the cast, she flies freely across the arena without the need of a jump!

An interchange student from a faraway land, Kiyumi is a gentle half-fox spirit wrangler who commands the not-so-gentle spirit, Kitsuro, who probably wants you dead. You control Kiyumi directly, while you command Kitsuro with her Strike to go after distant bullets.

An even cooler reflection of Rigel, accidentally created by a magical mirror. Betel G plays like a heavier version of Rigel with similar abilities, with some unique twists of his own! Hit bullets with the tip of his wand to give them a speed boost!

Wandit, the headless dog, is a completely normal dog that stole one of the most powerful wands in the world, thinking it was just a chew toy. Move his body like you would any other character, and control his head separately using his Special Move!
